title: eryngium irgangii
intro: Eryngium irgangii, also known as Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Korea, and its medicinal properties lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Eryngium irgangii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
